task: C0 M1 Correction 2 Inspector Restore, Void Echo and Membrane Colour Truth
owner_observed_issue_disposition: Every registered widget launcher now generically mounts, focuses, expands and viewport-reveals its target through the existing WidgetHost/WidgetFrame and ephemeral central-store UI state.
Both Dock and Rail Inspector launchers restore the full Inspector body in one click; background focus and minimized recovery were verified in the built artifact.
The unconditional Void inner echo was removed from live Canvas2D and Classic SVG while preserving outer fill/edge, negative subtraction, selection, dragging, hit testing and persistence.
A reproduced sparse Void Edge-only edit no longer resets inherited Fill opacity; normalization now removes explicit undefined leaves.
Membrane Cell Gradient remains the unchanged default; Solid Black, Ink, MOOORF Red, Charcoal and Custom resolve through canonical persisted presentation state and the audited material registry.
Solid Organism fields set palette and spatial Cell colour mixing to zero, so no Cell-derived patches remain; Cell Gradient keeps the prior palette/spatial projection.
Correction 1 Escape, status, bottom-bar, Boundary and Core-off fixes remain executable-regression protected.
There remains exactly one Inspector: Content and Appearance are M1 tabs, Symbol is reserved as a future tab in this Inspector for M2, and Material Browser remains M4.
verification_summary: all 31 src/**/*.test.ts files passed through npx --yes tsx, including executable widget lifecycle, renderer, history, persistence, import and export behavior
npx tsc -b --pretty false passed with zero diagnostics
exactly one final npm run build passed in 15.8 seconds with the accepted Vite large-chunk warning only; main app chunk 983.99 kB / 315.98 kB gzip
deterministic built-artifact QA passed at 1440x900 and 1280x800; final browser warning/error log was empty
project snapshot, import, saved-view, live renderer and Classic SVG export contracts prove Membrane colour and Void layer parity; PNG/PDF retain the existing clean capture owner
verified preview remains available at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
known_limitations: Membrane Field and Edge are shared project fields and therefore edit Project Defaults rather than disconnected per-Cell overrides.
Organism has no truthful vector Membrane path; M1 does not synthesize one.
Advanced instruments, selection-orbit treatment and Symbol remain assigned to M2 inside the same Inspector.
M2 Membrane Field Edge Softness remains the existing field/body feather owner; independent Membrane Edge Softness is a future separate Edge owner and must not alias it.
Optional Void Inner Echo is M2-only, default off, and requires canonical live/export parity.
Material Browser remains assigned to M4.
The in-app browser does not expose file-saver transport as a download event; product completion state and deterministic export contracts were verified.

previous_task.merge_status: NOT MERGED — M1 BUILT DIRECTLY ON THIS HEAD

one Inspector with M1 Content and Appearance tabs and a future M2 Symbol-tab seam
coordinated text presets, Text Size, Text Colour and Auto Contrast
three visible Appearance family widgets covering six canonical internal editing targets
Project Default, Local Override and Mixed states
persistence, migration and clean PNG/SVG/PDF export parity
documented rebind, movement or removal of every stale, broken or no-op visual control

advanced Inspector instruments assigned to M2
Quick Materials or full Material Browser assigned to M4
